---
title: "Hobbies"
format: html
---

# Art & Drawing
Grew up exploring a variety of mediums. This includes sketching, painting, sculpting, and digital art.  
![Yes](Chau_ArtCollage.png)

# Lion Dancing
My active hobby since I was 12 years old. A cultural activity that requires acrobats, endurance, and dance! 


# Eating
I love going out to eat with friends, especially all you can eats.
